title: App Settings - Navigation
scenario: Verify navigation within the Poly Studio Menu by accessing each settings tab and returning to the main menu using both the back icon and swipe gesture.
steps: Tap hamburger icon to open Poly Studio Menu.
Tap any tab to view corresponding settings screen.
Tap back icon '<' to return to main menu.
Open a tab and swipe right from left edge to return to main menu.
Repeat for all available settings tabs.
expected: User can access every tab and navigate back to the main home screen.
